title: phlegmariurus elmeri
intro: Phlegmariurus elmeri, a species of club moss or lycopod, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, Phlegmariurus elmeri has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been employed to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Phlegmariurus elmeri can be consumed as a tea, taken in capsule form, or applied topically to the skin as an infusion or ointment.
